description_long: This object is a sleek, modern wireless router with a matte black finish and three prominent external antennas extending from the back and sides, enhancing its signal range. The body is rectangular with layered horizontal segments, giving it a robust and high-tech appearance. Subtle gold accents are visible near the antenna bases and on the top surface, where a brand logo is also present. The front face features faintly visible labels, likely indicating ports or status areas, and a thin blue line that may serve as an indicator light. The overall design is compact and streamlined, suitable for placement on desks or shelves in urban environments. No ports are visible in these views, suggesting they are located on the rear or underside.
description: A matte black, rectangular wireless router with three external antennas and gold accents, featuring a layered design and a blue indicator light on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing three antennas, gold accents, a blue indicator light, and subtle front labels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right-side antenna and the layered body structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying all three antennas and gold accent details, with no visible ports.
description_view_3: Angled left-side view emphasizing the left antenna and the device's stacked design.
